External ID: This is the unique backend identifier. If there are multiple lines associated with the same journal entry, an external ID is required to inform the system that these lines belong to the same entry. Any alphanumeric value can be enter as an external ID.
Subsidiary:
HEADER 

Select the subsidiary associated with this transaction.
Date:
HEADER

Enter the date on which the JE is to be created. Date should be entered in the format  DD/MM/YYYY.
Entry No:
HEADER 

Enter a identifier transaction number
Account:
LINES

This is a reference to the GL account against which the amounts have to be posted.  The complete hierarchy of the accounts should be provided if you want to refer to a child account. The expected format is Child Account Number Parent Account Name : Child Account Name.

The account must be setup in Lists > Accounting > Accounts prior to import.
Debit:
LINES

Enter the debit amount in this field.
Credit:
LINES

Enter the credit amount in this field.
Department:
LINES

Select Department for the current line.
Name:
LINES

Select Customer/Vendor/Employee for the current line.
